title: PerplexedClientUtils
description: A bunch of clientside QoL mods for players
body:
# Features
## ToggleDisplay
See when your vanilla toggle sprint/sneak is active or inactive
![Toggle Display Widget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/354b3ad118286973596bee584a3a81630ae95cf7.png)
## Arrow HUD
Widget to see how many arrows you have left
![Arrow Hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86672d1eb40ac8f40cb4af4c8be1880c1f044707.png)
## Item HUD
Widget to see how many items of the item that you are holding in your inventory
![item hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00db1923607b4280cf4f7cac48f9f136d2b88977.png)
Alternatively, you can 'pin' an item so it will only show how much of the 'pinned' item you have in your inventory, regardless of what you're holding
![Pinned Item HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b31cb9c17ab40fc5001801a41fcddc14f96a75_0.webp)
## Potion Display
A nice little timer on your potion effects to see the intensity and the duration
![potion display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b1ae91a44183d9555251066c90e0654971070c_0.webp)
## Ping Display
A widget that can tell you the ping on the server that you're connected to
![ping display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ffd1b93d9eb7e70d5de889dfe46c1272d559037.png)
## Fullbright
If it's too dark, with a click of a button you can turn on FullBright to make everything light up
![fullbright](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2040546daadb5c372cb391927b0edd7841a5bf_0.webp)
# Limitless customization
With the configuration menu accessed throught ModMenu, you can edit all the settings to your desires.
![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b5eb2b9d5d322884a65b525615a6f2f6be7a4b.png)
Furthermore, you can move and scale the widgets to whereever you like with the drag n drop widget display
![moving menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9007535f691adb22c4dfcd8ac6cd0351faa0c368_0.webp)
